Usage dropped by 15% this month. The champion left the company, and the new POC is evaluating competitor tools. We discussed a potential ROI workshop to show value, but they are focused on short-term cost-cutting. Recommended a 10% discount to stabilize the account.

Detailed quarterly business review conducted. The customer is currently in a high-growth phase but is struggling with internal adoption of our advanced features. We identified several friction points: 1. Lack of training for the mid-level management tier. 2. Integration delays with their legacy ERP system. 3. Budgetary constraints for the upcoming fiscal year. The CTO expressed interest in a multi-year strategic partnership but needs a formal value-based roadmap. We analyzed the 'Success Path' of similar clients in the Manufacturing sector and proposed a three-stage rollout plan including a Strategic Advisory Workshop and a dedicated Customer Success Manager. The risk of churn is moderate due to competitor pressure from Vendor X, but the relationship at the executive level remains strong. Action items: Draft the ROI justification document, schedule a follow-up with the procurement lead, and review the Margin Protection Policy (POL-444) before offering any deeper pricing concessions.Detailed quarterly business review conducted.
